name: 05_diff_exactly_zero_resets
description: Branch 2 (gate fails): weighted_vwap_diff EXACTLY 0.0 fails the strict `< 0` gate, so both tick counters reset.
derivation: Outer guard passes. Inner gate: `weighted_vwap_diff < 0` -> 0.0 < 0 is FALSE (strict less-than). Gate fails -> both ticks reset to 0. Returns (0, 0, False, False). Boundary case: confirms diff gate uses `<` not `<=`.
